productDisplayName: Allen Solly Kids Girls Poplin Pink Shorts
description: Style NoteColour happy pastel tones in this oh-so-cute pair of shorts to match the colours of spring, from allen solly, now on myntra. Imagine your little one frolicking in this pretty piece! Has an elasticated waistband for a perfect Fit (with room to grow). A bow makes everything better and this sweet pair has four of them! Pick up this pair before stocks run out. Product DetailsPale pink shorts with an elasticated waistband, has two pockets on the front with bow details, rolled-up hems, two patch pockets at the back with bow details on itMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldDelicate cycleDo not bleach or iron on printWarm iron when neededTumble dry low or lay flat to dry
